title: Big Pony
body:
_Ah AM a big pony!_

\
Successor to FillyCam and accessory mod to [Mine Little Pony](https://modrinth.com/mod/mine-little-pony), **Big Pony** allows the player to customise their camera position, distance, and body size to make playing with Mine Little Pony more enjoyable.

\
You can install this mod alone or together with its companion mod. When combined with Mine Little Pony, the mod will give you the option to link your size and camera with your pony skin. Playing without it lets you use the mod in free mode.

\
**Multiplayer Support**

\
Server admins have the ability to enable or disable various parts of this mod that may be considered "cheaty". Things like camera position and hitbox alterations are **opt-in**, and will require the server to have this mod installed to allow.
